src="/_vercel/insights/script.js" defer="" data-sdkn="@vercel/analytics/next" data-sdkv="1.6.1" data-disable-auto-track="1"></script><script>(function(w,d){{(function(w,d){})(window, document)}})(window,document)</script><script>(function(w,d){;w.zarazData.executed.push("Pageview");;w.zarazData.executed.push("zxcg");})(window,document)</script><script>(function(w,d){{const d = document.createElement('div');d.innerHTML = ``;document.body.appendChild(d);};{
  if (!window.unifier) {

    window.unifier = (function () {

      function getCookie(name) {
        const match = document.cookie.match(new RegExp('(^| )' + name + '=([^;]+)'));
        return match ? decodeURIComponent(match[2]) : null;
      }

      // Clear stale public_tc_page_viewer_* identities
      (function clearPublicTcViewerIdentity() {
        const userId = getCookie('ajs_user_id');

        if (userId && userId.startsWith('public_tc_page_viewer_')) {
          // Delete cookie for common Neon domains
          document.cookie = 'ajs_user_id=; domain=.neon.com; path=/; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT';

          if (typeof localStorage !== 'undefined') {
            localStorage.removeItem('is_unified');
          }
        }
      })();

      function stripUrlParams() {
        const url = new URL(window.location.href);
        if (url.search.length > 0) {
          window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, url.pathname);
        }
      }

      const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);

      // if a refcode is set, redirect automatically
      const refcode = params.get('refcode');
      const ajsAnonId = getCookie('ajs_anonymous_id');
      if(refcode && refcode.length === 8) {
        window.location = `https://neon.tech/unify?n=${window.location.pathname.slice(1)}&r=${refcode}${ajsAnonId ? `&a=${ajsAnonId}` : ''}`;
      }
      const chatId = params.get('chatId');
      if(typeof localStorage !== 'undefined' && localStorage.getItem('is_unified') !== 'true' && chatId && chatId.length === 36) {
        localStorage.setItem('prev_chat', chatId);
        window.location = `https://neon.tech/unify?n=${window.location.pathname.slice(1)}${ajsAnonId ? `&a=${ajsAnonId}` : ''}`;
      }

      if (!params.get('a') && typeof localStorage !== 'undefined' && localStorage.getItem('is_unified') !== 'true') {
        document.addEventListener('mousedown', function (e) {
          // Only act on left-clicks with no modifier keys
          if (
            e.defaultPrevented ||
            e.button !== 0 ||
            e.metaKey ||
            e.ctrlKey ||
            e.shiftKey ||
            e.altKey
          ) return;

          // Find nearest <a> element
          const anchor = e.target.tagName === 'A' ? e.target : e.target.closest('a');

          if (
            anchor &&
            anchor.href &&
            anchor.href.startsWith('https://neon.tech/unify')
          ) {
            // Force a full page reload
            window.location.href = anchor.href;
          }
        });

        const links = document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="/"], a[href^="https://console.neon.tech/signup"], a[href^="https://console.neon.tech/login"]');
        

        links.forEach((link) => {
          if(!link.href.endsWith(".zip")) {
            const url = new URL(link.href, location.origin);
            const path = url.pathname.replace(/^\/+/, ''); // remove leading slash
            const redirectUrl = `https://neon.tech/unify?a=${ajsAnonId}&n=${path}`;
            link.href = redirectUrl;
          }
        });
      }

<hr>
<h2 id="about-this-integration" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>About this integration</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#about-this-integration" aria-label="Link to About this integration"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<p><strong>Vercel-Managed Integration</strong> (also known as <em>Neon Postgres Native Integration</em>) lets you add a Neon Postgres database to your Vercel project <strong>with billing handled entirely inside Vercel</strong>. Installing it:</p>
<ul>
<li>Creates a Neon account + project for you (if you don't already have one)</li>
<li>For existing Neon users, adds a new organization named <code>Vercel: <team-name></code> to your account</li>
<li>Injects the required database environment variables (<code>DATABASE_URL</code>, etc.) into your Vercel project</li>
<li>Optionally creates a dedicated database branch for every Preview Deployment so you can test schema changes safely</li>
</ul>
<div class="admonition not-prose my-9 rounded-none border-l-2 bg-gray-new-98 py-4 pr-5 pl-[1.125rem] dark:bg-gray-new-8 border-[#2D8665] dark:border-green-52 [&_pre]:px-4 [&_pre]:py-3 [&_pre_code]:text-sm! [&_pre[data-language]]:bg-white! [&_pre[data-language]]:dark:bg-gray-new-8!"><div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#2D8665] dark:text-green-52"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="shrink-0"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m12 2 2 2-6.4 6.4-2.8.8.8-2.8z"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12.4 9.2v3.6a1.2 1.2 0 0 1-1.2 1.2h-8A1.2 1.2 0 0 1 2 12.8v-8a1.2 1.2 0 0 1 1.2-1.2h3.6"></path></svg><h4 class="font-mono text-[13px] leading-none font-medium -tracking-snug uppercase">Who should use this path?</h4></div><div class="admonition-text mt-2.5 text-base leading-normal tracking-extra-tight text-gray-new-20 dark:text-gray-new-85 [&_a]:rounded-sm [&_li]:text-base [&_li]:leading-snug [&_li]:tracking-extra-tight [&_ul]:my-0 [&_ol]:my-0"><p>Choose the Vercel-Managed Integration if you <strong>do not already have a Neon account</strong> <em>or</em> you prefer to consolidate payment for Neon inside your Vercel invoice.</p></div></div>
<hr>

You'll notice it lives in an organization named <code>Vercel: <your-vercel-team></code>.</p></div></li></ol>
<hr>
<h2 id="connecting-the-database-to-a-vercel-project" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Connecting the database to a Vercel project</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#connecting-the-database-to-a-vercel-project" aria-label="Link to Connecting the database to a Vercel project"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<ol>
<li>
<p>In <strong>Storage → <code><your database></code> → Connect Project</strong> choose the Vercel project and the environments that should receive database variables (Development, Preview, Production).</p>
<p><span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-fc92d111fe98" data-rmiz=""><span data-rmiz-content="not-found" style="visibility:visible"><img alt="Connect a Vercel Project" loading="lazy" width="704" height="447" decoding="async" data-nimg="1" class="" style="color:transparent;width:100%;height:100%" src="/docs/guides/vercel_native_connect_project.png?dpl=dpl_3dVBA6w9XgBJqgQiTspW87gTgMs1"></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>(Optional) Under <strong>Advanced Options → Deployments Configuration</strong> enable <strong>Preview</strong> to turn on <em>Preview Branching</em> (see next section).</p>
<p><span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-7cf955d83c3d" data-rmiz=""><span data-rmiz-content="not-found" style="visibility:visible"><img alt="Vercel deployment configuration" loading="lazy" width="704" height="447" decoding="async" data-nimg="1" class="" style="color:transparent;width:100%;height:100%" src="/docs/guides/vercel_native_deployments_configuration.png?dpl=dpl_3dVBA6w9XgBJqgQiTspW87gTgMs1"></span></span></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Click <strong>Connect</strong>.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="admonition not-prose my-9 rounded-none border-l-2 bg-gray-new-98 py-4 pr-5 pl-[1.125rem] dark:bg-gray-new-8 border-[#BE8A3C] dark:border-[#FFED9C] [&_pre]:px-4 [&_pre]:py-3 [&_pre_code]:text-sm! [&_pre[data-language]]:bg-white! [&_pre[data-language]]:dark:bg-gray-new-8!"><div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#BE8A3C] dark:text-[#FFED9C]"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="shrink-0"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8 11.5a5 5 0 1 0 0-10 5 5 0 0 0 0 10Z"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M5 6.5a3 3 0 0 1 3-3"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="m5.781 11 .282 3H10l.281-3"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7 15h2"></path></svg><h4 class="font-mono text-[13px] leading-none font-medium -tracking-snug uppercase">Environment variable prefix</h4></div><div class="admonition-text mt-2.5 text-base leading-normal tracking-extra-tight text-gray-new-20 dark:text-gray-new-85 [&_a]:rounded-sm [&_li]:text-base [&_li]:leading-snug [&_li]:tracking-extra-tight [&_ul]:my-0 [&_ol]:my-0">You can add a prefix if you have multiple databases in the same project, for example <code>PRIMARY_</code>.</div></div>
<hr>
<h2 id="enable-automated-preview-branching-recommended" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Enable automated preview branching (recommended)</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#enable-automated-preview-branching-recommended" aria-label="Link to Enable automated preview branching (recommended)"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<p>Preview branching creates an isolated Neon branch (copy-on-write) for every Vercel Preview Deployment so database schema changes can be tested safely.</p>
<div class="admonition not-prose my-9 rounded-none border-l-2 bg-gray-new-98 py-4 pr-5 pl-[1.125rem] dark:bg-gray-new-8 border-[#BE8A3C] dark:border-[#FFED9C] [&_pre]:px-4 [&_pre]:py-3 [&_pre_code]:text-sm! [&_pre[data-language]]:bg-white! [&_pre[data-language]]:dark:bg-gray-new-8!"><div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#BE8A3C] dark:text-[#FFED9C]"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="shrink-0"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8 11.5a5 5 0 1 0 0-10 5 5 0 0 0 0 10Z"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M5 6.5a3 3 0 0 1 3-3"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="m5.781 11 .282 3H10l.281-3"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7 15h2"></path></svg><h4 class="font-mono text-[13px] leading-none font-medium -tracking-snug uppercase">Neon Auth support for preview deployments</h4></div><div class="admonition-text mt-2.5 text-base leading-normal tracking-extra-tight text-gray-new-20 dark:text-gray-new-85 [&_a]:rounded-sm [&_li]:text-base [&_li]:leading-snug [&_li]:tracking-extra-tight [&_ul]:my-0 [&_ol]:my-0"><p>If you've enabled <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/auth/overview">Neon Auth</a> on your production branch, it's automatically provisioned on preview branches too. Preview deployments receive <code>NEON_AUTH_BASE_URL</code> and <code>VITE_NEON_AUTH_URL</code> environment variables, letting you test authentication in isolated environments. Auth data branches with your database, so each preview has its own independent user profiles and sessions.</p></div></div>
<p>To enable:</p>
<ol>
<li>While connecting the project (step above) toggle <strong>Required → Preview</strong>.</li>
<li>Make sure <strong>Resource must be active before deployment</strong> is also on. This allows Vercel to wait for the branch to be ready.</li>
</ol>
<p>Once enabled, the flow looks like this:</p>
<ol>
<li>
<p>Developer pushes to feature branch → Vercel kicks off Preview Deployment.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Vercel sends a webhook to Neon → Neon creates branch <code>preview/<git-branch></code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Environment variables for the branch connection are injected via webhook at deployment time, overriding preview environment variables for this deployment only (cannot be accessed or viewed in your Vercel project's environment variable settings).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>(Optional) Run migrations in build step so schema matches code.</p>
<p><span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-fce8f558b71f" data-rmiz=""><span data-rmiz-content="not-found" style="visibility:visible"><img alt="Vercel build commands" loading="lazy" width="704" height="447" decoding="async" data-nimg="1" class="" style="color:transparent;width:100%;height:100%" src="/docs/guides/vercel_build_command.png?dpl=dpl_3dVBA6w9XgBJqgQiTspW87gTgMs1"></span></span></p>
<p>To apply schema changes automatically, add migration commands to your Vercel build configuration:</p>
<ol>
<li>
<p>Go to <strong>Vercel Dashboard → Settings → Build and Deployment Settings</strong></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Enable <strong>Override</strong> and add your build commands, including migrations, for example:</p>
<figure class="code-block group/code-block relative flex flex-col [&_pre]:min-w-full rounded-none border border-gray-new-80 dark:border-gray-new-20 [&>pre]:my-0 [&>pre]:rounded-none [&>pre]:bg-white! [&>pre]:py-4 [&>pre]:dark:bg-black-pure!" data-has-filename="false" data-line-numbers="false"><pre class="shiki css-variables" style="background-color:var(--shiki-background);color:var(--shiki-foreground)" tabindex="0" data-language="bash"><code class="grid"><span class="line" data-line="1"><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-function)">npx</span><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-string)"> prisma</span><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-string)"> migrate</span><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-string)"> deploy</span><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-punctuation)"> &&</span><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-function)"> npm</span><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-string)"> run</span><span style="color:var(--shiki-token-string)"> build</span></span></code></pre><button class="invisible absolute right-4 border border-gray-new-80 bg-white p-1.5 text-gray-new-40 opacity-0 transition-[background-color,opacity,visibility] duration-200 group-hover/code-block:visible group-hover/code-block:opacity-100 hover:bg-gray-new-90 dark:border-gray-new-20 dark:bg-black-pure dark:text-gray-new-60 dark:hover:bg-gray-new-8 lg:visible lg:opacity-100 top-[min(1rem,calc(50%-.8175rem))]" type="button" aria-label="Copy"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-current"><rect width="8.995" height="9.002" x="5.939" y="5.935" stroke="currentColor" rx="1"></rect><path fill="currentColor" fill-rule="evenodd" d="M2.434.935a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-1.5 1.5v7.001a1.5 1.5 0 0 0 1.5 1.5h1.499a.5.5 0 0 0 0-1h-1.5a.5.5 0 0 1-.5-.5V2.435a.5.5 0 0 1 .5-.5h6.995a.5.5 0 0 1 .5.5v1.5a.5.5 0 1 0 1 0v-1.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-1.5-1.5z" clip-rule="evenodd"></path></svg></button></figure>
</li>
</ol>
<p>This ensures schema changes in your commits are applied to each preview deployment's database branch.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="test-the-setup" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Test the setup</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#test-the-setup" aria-label="Link to Test the setup"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>To verify preview branching works:</p>
<ol>
<li>Create a local branch: <code>git checkout -b test-feature</code></li>
<li>Make any change and commit: <code>git commit -a -m "Test change"</code></li>
<li>Push: <code>git push</code></li>
<li>Check Vercel deployments and Neon Console branches to confirm the preview branch was created</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2 id="automatic-branch-cleanup" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Automatic branch cleanup</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#automatic-branch-cleanup" aria-label="Link to Automatic branch cleanup"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<p>Preview branches are automatically deleted when their corresponding Vercel deployments are removed. The timing of this cleanup depends on <a class="group inline" href="https://vercel.com/docs/deployment-retention" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Vercel's deployment retention policy<span class="whitespace-nowrap no-underline"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="ml-1 inline-block size-3.5! shrink-0 align-[-0.125em]"><path fill="currentColor" d="M0 0h14v14H0z" opacity="0.2"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" d="M9.915 8.885V4.08H5.11M9.625 4.375 4.083 9.917"></path></svg></span></a>, which retains preview deployments for 6 months by default.</p>
<div class="admonition not-prose my-9 rounded-none border-l-2 bg-gray-new-98 py-4 pr-5 pl-[1.125rem] dark:bg-gray-new-8 border-[#EC6F09] dark:border-[#F99D51] [&_pre]:px-4 [&_pre]:py-3 [&_pre_code]:text-sm! [&_pre[data-language]]:bg-white! [&_pre[data-language]]:dark:bg-gray-new-8!"><div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#EC6F09] dark:text-[#F99D51]"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="shrink-0"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-width="1.333" d="M8.003 2C4.32 2 1.336 4.686 1.336 8c0 1.229.412 2.37 1.117 3.322l-.816 3.044 3.524-.945A7.2 7.2 0 0 0 8.003 14c3.682 0 6.666-2.686 6.666-6s-2.984-6-6.666-6ZM8 8.332v-3"></path><path fill="currentColor" d="M8.005 11.667a.833.833 0 1 0 0-1.667.833.833 0 0 0 0 1.667"></path></svg><h4 class="font-mono text-[13px] leading-none font-medium -tracking-snug uppercase">Preview branches may not be deleted for months</h4></div><div class="admonition-text mt-2.5 text-base leading-normal tracking-extra-tight text-gray-new-20 dark:text-gray-new-85 [&_a]:rounded-sm [&_li]:text-base [&_li]:leading-snug [&_li]:tracking-extra-tight [&_ul]:my-0 [&_ol]:my-0"><p>Because of Vercel's default retention settings, preview branches can persist long after a PR is closed. To understand the full timeline, reduce your retention policy, or set up immediate cleanup, see <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/guides/vercel-branch-cleanup">Managing Vercel preview branch cleanup</a>.</p></div></div>
<hr>
<h2 id="managing-and-billing" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Managing & billing</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#managing-and-billing" aria-label="Link to Managing & billing"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<p>Because your database is managed by Vercel, you can only perform these actions <strong>in the Vercel dashboard</strong>:</p>
<ul>
<li>Change plan, billing tier, or scale settings (compute size, autoscaling, scale-to-zero)</li>
<li>View or modify database configuration via <strong>Storage → Settings → Change Configuration</strong></li>
<li>Monitor usage via <strong>Storage → Usage</strong> (also available in Neon Console)</li>
<li>Create additional databases (each becomes a new Neon project)</li>
<li>Rename or delete a database (deleting removes the underlying Neon project permanently)</li>
<li>Manage members / collaborators (handled through Vercel "Members", not the Neon Console) - (see <a class="" href="#frequently-asked-questions-faq">FAQ</a> for details)</li>
<li>Delete the Neon organization (only happens automatically if you uninstall the integration)</li>
<li>Update connection-string environment variables (prefix changes, etc.)</li>
</ul>
<p>Everything else (querying data, branching, monitoring usage) works exactly the same in the Neon Console.</p>
<p>If you're on Neon's Scale plan, you can open support tickets for any Neon issue directly from the Neon Console. See <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/introduction/support">Support tickets</a> for details.</p>
<h3 id="team-member-synchronization" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Team member synchronization</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#team-member-synchronization" aria-label="Link to Team member synchronization"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>Team membership changes in Vercel automatically sync to your Neon organization:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Initial access</strong>: Team members must click <strong>Open in Neon</strong> from the Vercel integration page and complete authentication before they appear in the Neon organization. This one-time step links their Vercel identity to Neon.</li>
<li><strong>Role changes</strong>: When a team member's role changes in Vercel, their Neon role updates based on Vercel's JWT token mapping (see <a class="" href="#why-do-vercel-team-members-with-member-role-have-the-admin-role-in-neon">FAQ</a> for details). Most Vercel roles (Owner, Admin, Member) map to 'Admin' in Neon, while read-only roles (Viewer, Billing) map to 'Member' in Neon.</li>
<li><strong>Removals</strong>: When a user is removed from your Vercel team, they're automatically removed from the associated Neon organization.</li>
</ul>
<p>This ensures both platforms stay aligned for security and access control.</p>
<h3 id="project-transfers-between-teams" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Project transfers between teams</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#project-transfers-between-teams" aria-label="Link to Project transfers between teams"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>When you transfer a Vercel project to another team, the linked Neon project automatically moves to the new team's Neon organization:</p>
<ul>
<li>The linked Neon project moves from the old organization to the new one.</li>
<li>Environment variables and settings transfer with it.</li>
<li>If the destination's plan doesn't support the project's requirements (autoscaling limits, point-in-time <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/introduction/history-window">history window</a>, etc.), you'll be prompted to upgrade.</li>
</ul>
<p>This eliminates the need to manually reconfigure integrations when reorganizing projects.</p>
<hr>
<h2 id="common-operations" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Common operations</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#common-operations" aria-label="Link to Common operations"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<h3 id="add-another-database-project" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Add another database (project)</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#add-another-database-project" aria-label="Link to Add another database (project)"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<ol>
<li>Go to <strong>Integrations → Neon Postgres → Manage → More Products → Install</strong></li>
<li>Select region, scale settings, and plan</li>
<li>Specify a <strong>Database Name</strong> and click <strong>Create</strong></li>
</ol>
<h3 id="change-compute-scale-settings" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Change compute / scale settings</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#change-compute-scale-settings" aria-label="Link to Change compute / scale settings"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p><strong>Storage → Settings → Change Configuration</strong> lets you resize compute, adjust scale-to-zero, or switch Neon plan tiers. Changes apply to <em>all</em> databases in the installation.</p>
<div class="admonition not-prose my-9 rounded-none border-l-2 bg-gray-new-98 py-4 pr-5 pl-[1.125rem] dark:bg-gray-new-8 border-[#EC6F09] dark:border-[#F99D51] [&_pre]:px-4 [&_pre]:py-3 [&_pre_code]:text-sm! [&_pre[data-language]]:bg-white! [&_pre[data-language]]:dark:bg-gray-new-8!"><div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#EC6F09] dark:text-[#F99D51]"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="shrink-0"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-miterlimit="10" stroke-width="1.333" d="M8.003 2C4.32 2 1.336 4.686 1.336 8c0 1.229.412 2.37 1.117 3.322l-.816 3.044 3.524-.945A7.2 7.2 0 0 0 8.003 14c3.682 0 6.666-2.686 6.666-6s-2.984-6-6.666-6ZM8 8.332v-3"></path><path fill="currentColor" d="M8.005 11.667a.833.833 0 1 0 0-1.667.833.833 0 0 0 0 1.667"></path></svg><h4 class="font-mono text-[13px] leading-none font-medium -tracking-snug uppercase">important</h4></div><div class="admonition-text mt-2.5 text-base leading-normal tracking-extra-tight text-gray-new-20 dark:text-gray-new-85 [&_a]:rounded-sm [&_li]:text-base [&_li]:leading-snug [&_li]:tracking-extra-tight [&_ul]:my-0 [&_ol]:my-0"><p>Changing your plan affects <strong>all databases</strong> in this integration, not just the current one.</p></div></div>
<h3 id="delete-the-database" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Delete the database</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#delete-the-database" aria-label="Link to Delete the database"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>Deleting from Vercel permanently removes the Neon project and all data. This cannot be undone.
To delete:</p>
<ol>
<li>Vercel Dashboard → Storage → Settings</li>
<li>Select your database</li>
<li>Find Delete Database section and confirm</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="disconnect-a-project-from-database" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Disconnect a project from database</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#disconnect-a-project-from-database" aria-label="Link to Disconnect a project from database"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>To disconnect a Vercel project without deleting the database:</p>
<ol>
<li>Go to <strong>Storage → <code><your database></code> → Projects</strong></li>
<li>Select your project and choose <strong>Remove Project Connection</strong></li>
</ol>
<p>This removes database environment variables from your Vercel project but keeps the database intact. Previously created preview branches remain but new ones won't be created.</p>
<h3 id="manage-branches-created-by-the-integration" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Manage branches created by the integration</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#manage-branches-created-by-the-integration" aria-label="Link to Manage branches created by the integration"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>You can manually delete preview branches at any time via the <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/manage/branches">Neon Console</a>, <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/cli/branches">Neon CLI</a>, or <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/manage/branches">Neon API</a>. For automated cleanup options, including GitHub Actions, see <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/guides/vercel-branch-cleanup">Managing Vercel preview branch cleanup</a>.</p>
<div class="admonition not-prose my-9 rounded-none border-l-2 bg-gray-new-98 py-4 pr-5 pl-[1.125rem] dark:bg-gray-new-8 border-[#2D8665] dark:border-green-52 [&_pre]:px-4 [&_pre]:py-3 [&_pre_code]:text-sm! [&_pre[data-language]]:bg-white! [&_pre[data-language]]:dark:bg-gray-new-8!"><div class="flex items-center gap-1 text-[#2D8665] dark:text-green-52"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="shrink-0"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m12 2 2 2-6.4 6.4-2.8.8.8-2.8z"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12.4 9.2v3.6a1.2 1.2 0 0 1-1.2 1.2h-8A1.2 1.2 0 0 1 2 12.8v-8a1.2 1.2 0 0 1 1.2-1.2h3.6"></path></svg><h4 class="font-mono text-[13px] leading-none font-medium -tracking-snug uppercase">Unused branches are archived</h4></div><div class="admonition-text mt-2.5 text-base leading-normal tracking-extra-tight text-gray-new-20 dark:text-gray-new-85 [&_a]:rounded-sm [&_li]:text-base [&_li]:leading-snug [&_li]:tracking-extra-tight [&_ul]:my-0 [&_ol]:my-0"><p>Branches you don't delete are eventually <a class="" href="https://neon.tech/unify?a=b4a96296-bbd7-4a36-b89d-e60413f63c5e&n=docs/guides/branch-archiving">archived</a>, reducing storage costs but still consuming archive storage space.</p></div></div>
<hr>
<h2 id="environment-variables-set-by-the-integration" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Environment variables set by the integration</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#environment-variables-set-by-the-integration" aria-label="Link to Environment variables set by the integration"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<div class="table-wrapper"><table><thead><tr><th style="text-align:left">Variable</th><th style="text-align:left">Purpose</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>DATABASE_URL</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Pooled connection string (PgBouncer)</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Direct connection string</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>PGHOST</code>, <code>PGHOST_UNPOOLED</code>, <code>PGUSER</code>, <code>PGDATABASE</code>, <code>PGPASSWORD</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Raw pieces to build custom strings</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>POSTGRES_*</code> (legacy)</td><td style="text-align:left">Provided for backwards compatibility with Vercel Postgres templates</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>NEON_AUTH_BASE_URL</code>, <code>VITE_NEON_AUTH_URL</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Neon Auth endpoints (when enabled on production branch)</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<hr>
<h2 id="limitations" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Limitations</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#limitations" aria-label="Link to Limitations"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<ul>
<li>You cannot use this integration with the <strong>Neon-Managed integration</strong> in the same Vercel project</li>
<li><strong>Neon CLI access</strong>: Requires API key authentication (the <code>neon auth</code> command won't work since the account is Vercel-managed)</li>
<li>Cannot install if you currently use Vercel Postgres (deprecated) - contact Vercel about transitioning</li>
<li><strong>Preview deployment environment variables</strong>: Branch-specific connection variables cannot be accessed or viewed in your Vercel project's environment variable settings (they're injected at deployment time only and not stored to avoid manual cleanup when branches are deleted)</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="frequently-asked-questions-faq" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-tighter"><span>Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#frequently-asked-questions-faq" aria-label="Link to Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3.5"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h2>
<h3 id="why-cant-i-see-vercel-team-members-in-the-neon-console" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Why can't I see Vercel team members in the Neon Console?</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#why-cant-i-see-vercel-team-members-in-the-neon-console" aria-label="Link to Why can't I see Vercel team members in the Neon Console?"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>Users added to your Vercel team aren't automatically visible in the Neon organization. Team members only appear in Neon when they:</p>
<ol>
<li>Click the <strong>Open in Neon</strong> button from the Vercel integration page</li>
<li>Complete the authentication flow</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="why-do-vercel-team-members-with-member-role-have-the-admin-role-in-neon" class="anchor-heading group relative w-fit scroll-mt-20 leading-tight font-medium lg:scroll-mt-5 tracking-extra-tight"><span>Why do Vercel team members with 'Member' role have the 'Admin' role in Neon?</span><a class="rounded-full px-2 no-underline opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:border-none hover:opacity-100 focus-visible:opacity-100 focus-visible:outline-offset-0 sm:hidden" href="#why-do-vercel-team-members-with-member-role-have-the-admin-role-in-neon" aria-label="Link to Why do Vercel team members with 'Member' role have the 'Admin' role in Neon?"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="inline text-green-44 dark:text-green-52 w-3"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.4" d="m3.938 12.688 1.75-11.375M8.313 12.688l1.75-11.375M3.063 4.813h8.75M2.188 9.188h8.75"></path></svg></a></h3>
<p>This occurs due to how Vercel's JWT tokens map roles to the integration. According to <a class="group inline" href="https://vercel.com/docs/integrations/create-integration/marketplace-api#user-authentication" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Vercel's documentation<span class="whitespace-nowrap no-underline"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 14 14" class="ml-1 inline-block size-3.5! shrink-0 align-[-0.125em]"><path fill="currentColor" d="M0 0h14v14H0z" opacity="0.2"></path><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="square" d="M9.915 8.885V4.08H5.11M9.625 4.375 4.083 9.917"></path></svg></span></a>, the JWT token's <code>user_role</code> claim doesn't directly map Vercel team roles:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>ADMIN role in JWT</strong>: Granted to users capable of installing integrations (includes Vercel Owner, Admin, and Member roles) → maps to Admin in Neon.</li>
<li><strong>USER role in JWT</strong>: Only granted to users with read-only Vercel roles (includes Billing and Viewer roles) → maps to Member in Neon.</li>
</ul>
<p>As a result, most active Vercel team members receive Admin access in the Neon organization. This is expected behavior and ensures team members can fully manage database resources.</p>
